temporal_description: A wide shot captures a tense scene in a dimly lit, modern conference room. A group of men are gathered around a long, dark table. On one side, several men in dark clothing are seated, their backs mostly to the camera. On the other side, an older man with gray hair, wearing a light-colored suit jacket, is seated and eating from a small plate. Standing behind him are several other men in light blue, button-down shirts and ties, observing the scene. In the background, more men are visible, some standing and some walking through a glass partition that separates the main room from another area. A large, dark, abstract map or image is mounted on the wall to the left. In the top left corner of the screen, white Chinese characters are visible. The camera remains stationary, providing a comprehensive view of the entire group and the room's layout. A man speaks in a calm, conversational, and slightly teasing tone, as if making a casual observation. He says, "哎，陈哥，胃口很好啊，不错嘛。" (Hey, Brother Chen, you have a good appetite, not bad.) Another man replies with a short, slightly gruff, and affirmative, "不错啊。" (Not bad.) The background is filled with the low, indistinct murmur of other people talking and moving around, creating the ambiance of a busy, professional environment. The camera cuts to a close-up of the older man at the table. He is focused on his meal, using chopsticks to pick up food from his plate. The shot highlights his profile and the action of eating. The background is dark and out of focus, keeping the attention on him. The white Chinese characters remain in the top left corner. The camera is static, maintaining a tight focus on the man's hands and face as he eats.
